## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? Link the issue this resolves. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Tests / CI only

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? Include the commands you ran and any manual scenarios. -->

- [ ] `composer test` passes locally
- [ ] Tested on a single-site WordPress install
- [ ] Tested on a multisite install (if relevant)
- [ ] New behavior covered by automated tests

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] `Unreleased` section of [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) updated
- [ ] Hooks/filters documented in the README if added
- [ ] No security regressions (auth flow, secret handling, REST/XML-RPC paths)
